validation_summary.evidence: python -m unittest discover skills/development-harness/scripts/tests exits 0 (171/171) -- docs-only unit, test suite unchanged

checkpoint.summary: unit_026 complete. New skills/development-harness/templates/claude-code/agents/harness-unit.md (new templates/claude-code/agents/ directory). YAML frontmatter: name=harness-unit, description (one-unit-in-isolated-worktree-then-emit-JSON-report), tools=[Read, Edit, Write, Glob, Grep, Bash]. System-prompt body has five sections -- Identity (read WORKTREE_UNIT.json first; fail loudly if missing), Tool allowlist with hard forbidden list (no git push/merge/rebase/reset --hard/checkout -b/worktree add-remove; no .harness/ edits; no writes outside the worktree), Workflow (read identity -> read phase doc -> optional explore -> implement -> validate -> commit on pre-created branch -> emit report), JSON report schema with exact fields from the phase doc (unit_id, status, validation_evidence, commits, touched_paths_actual, failure with category enum), and three worked report examples (success, validation failure, scope_violation failure). Docs-only; 171/171 tests unchanged.
checkpoint.next_action: Complete unit_027 (PHASE_006): update skills/development-harness/templates/claude-code/rules/harness-core.md with three orchestrator-vs-sub-agent boundary rules (only orchestrator modifies .harness/ or runs git merge; sub-agents commit only within their worktree branch and never push/rebase; a worktree containing .harness/WORKTREE_UNIT.json is a fan-out environment).
